---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

<!-- Describe the change. Code-level or product-level both fine. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem this solves, the use case it enables -->

## Anti-goals

<!-- What this should NOT do. Helps reviewers understand scope. -->

## Compatibility with the protocol's invariants

- [ ] Does NOT introduce a delete / ban / hide primitive at the protocol layer
- [ ] Does NOT require platform-level moderation
- [ ] Does NOT add identity factors beyond WebAuthn (no phone/email)
- [ ] Mute and block remain client-side
